Our Mechanic Services

Tap any service category to learn more about the common repairs we perform on-site.

Electrical & Diagnostics

Check Engine Lights & Power Issues

We diagnose and repair check engine lights, dead batteries, faulty alternators, starters, and complex electrical shorts right in your driveway.

View Service Details

Brakes & Suspension

Safety & Ride Quality

Complete brake jobs including pads, rotors, and calipers. We also handle shocks, struts, control arms, and other suspension components.

View Service Details

Engine & Cooling

Belts, Pumps & Radiators

Serpentine belts, timing belts, water pumps, radiators, and cooling fans. We keep your engine running at the right temperature.

View Service Details

Preventative Maintenance

Fluids & Tune-ups

Mobile oil changes, transmission fluid service, coolant flushes, spark plugs, and ignition coils to keep your vehicle reliable.

View Service Details

Pre-Purchase Used Car Inspections

Buying a used car? Have us come out and inspect it before you hand over the cash. We'll check the engine, transmission, brakes, and scan the computer for hidden codes so you know exactly what you're buying. Protect your investment with a professional second opinion.

Electrical & Diagnostics

On-Site Diagnostic Scan
Call Us

Modern vehicles rely heavily on complex electrical systems. We bring advanced dealership-level diagnostic scanners directly to your driveway to accurately identify the root cause of check engine lights or starting issues.

Common Symptoms

Check Engine Light is illuminated or flashing
Car struggles to start or clicks when turning the key
Headlights dim when accelerating
Battery dies frequently

Services We Perform

Full OBD2 computer system scan
Battery load and health testing
Alternator voltage and output test
Starter amp draw test
Visual wiring and fuse inspection
If your check engine light is flashing red, pull over safely and turn off the engine immediately to prevent severe damage.

When your check engine light illuminates in Rehoboth Beach, ignoring it can lead to expensive engine damage. Our mobile diagnostic service utilizes state-of-the-art OBD2 scanners to pull error codes, check live sensor data, and perform electrical load testing right in your driveway. From faulty oxygen sensors and loose gas caps to complex wiring issues and dead alternators, our expert mobile mechanics quickly pinpoint the exact cause of your vehicle's problem so you can get back on the road safely and affordably.
